<!--
This directory-form entry exists only so tooling that globs
`.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/*.md` finds a template. The canonical,
auto-populated pull-request template is the single root file
`.github/pull_request_template.md` — edit that one. Do not let the two drift.
-->

See the repository's default pull-request template at
[`.github/pull_request_template.md`](../pull_request_template.md), and the
process contract in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md). Fill in: the
linked ticket (`tid` + `docs/implementation/` path), the acceptance criteria
this PR satisfies, and the Definition-of-done checklist (tests-first confirmed,
merge-gate CI checks named, docs/rustdoc updated).
